ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the governing body (e.g., Devon County Council) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_number" TEXT /* Unique transaction number */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "vat_reg_no" TEXT /* VAT registration number of the supplier */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense area */,
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense type */,
  "expense_code" INTEGER /* Code for the expense */,
  "creditor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creditor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "redacted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the transaction has been redacted */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the transaction */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department responsible for the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the transaction (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_id") REFERENCES bodies ("body_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_creditor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("creditor_type_id") REFERENCES creditor_types ("creditor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_expense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_type_id") REFERENCES expense_types ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bodies" (
  "body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governing body */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the governing body */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the governing body */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the body */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the governing body */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the governing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the governing body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "vat_reg_no" TEXT /* VAT registration number of the supplier */,
  "creditor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creditor type */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "bank_account_details" TEXT /* Bank account details of the supplier (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the expense area */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager responsible for the expense area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the expense area */,
  "expense_codes" TEXT /* Codes associated with the expense type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_types_expense_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_area_id") REFERENCES expense_areas ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creditor_types" (
  "creditor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creditor type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the creditor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creditor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creditor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance officer, auditor, department head) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_values" TEXT /* Old values before the change */,
  "new_values" TEXT /* New values after the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
